mapper.insert: INSERT INTO clazz ( name, room, begin_date, end_date, master_id, subject, create_time, update_time ) VALUES ( #{name}, #{room}, #{beginDate}, #{endDate}, #{masterId}, #{subject}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime} )
mapper.select: SELECT c.*, e.name AS master_name, CASE WHEN c.end_date IS NULL THEN '未开班' WHEN c.end_date < CURDATE() THEN '已结课' ELSE '在读' END AS status FROM clazz c LEFT JOIN emp e ON c.master_id = e.id WHERE c.id = #{id}
mapper.update:
UPDATE clazz
name = #{name},
room = #{room},
begin_date = #{beginDate},
end_date = #{endDate},
master_id = #{masterId},
subject = #{subject},
update_time = #{updateTime},
WHERE id = #{id}
